app.title: Coursework Commons
feed.title: Discussion
feed.subtitle: Newest posts first.
feed.empty.title: No posts yet
feed.empty.body: This course doesn't have any discussion posts yet. Check back soon.
feed.error: Couldn't load the discussion. Try again.
feed.forbidden.title: This course is not open to you
feed.forbidden.body: You're not enrolled in this course, so its discussion is hidden.
feed.notFound.title: Course not found
feed.notFound.body: This course doesn't exist or may have been removed.
saved.title: Saved posts
saved.subtitle: Everything you've bookmarked, most recent first.
saved.empty.title: Nothing saved yet
saved.empty.body: Tap the bookmark on any post in the discussion to keep it here for later.
saved.error: Couldn't load your saved posts. Try again.
post.savesCount: {count, plural, =0 {No saves} one {# save} other {# saves}}
moderator.removeConfirm: Remove this post for everyone? This can't be undone.
time.minutesAgo: {count, plural, one {# minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
time.hoursAgo: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
time.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}
